name: NavigationDrawer
description: The navigation drawer is the portal's primary, persistent navigation — anchored to the left edge and grouped by purpose. It's how operators move between the map, assets, and the domain pillars throughout a session.
keyRule: On desktop the drawer is permanent (always visible) — not a temporary overlay. Group items by purpose so the model stays legible; default new features into a pillar, not the top level.

variants.name: Permanent
variants.whenToUse: Default on desktop — always visible alongside content.

variants.name: Collapsible
variants.whenToUse: Can collapse to a rail (icons only) to reclaim width.

variants.name: Grouped
variants.whenToUse: Sections by purpose (Quick access / Pillars / Workflow & comms).

anatomy.name: Section header
anatomy.description: optional group label (Quick access, Pillars, Workflow).

anatomy.name: Item
anatomy.description: a destination with an icon + label.

anatomy.name: Badge
anatomy.description: optional count on an item (e.g. unread alerts).

behaviors.name: Selection
behaviors.description: The current destination shows the active indicator; selecting an item navigates and updates it.

behaviors.name: Collapse
behaviors.description: Collapsing hides labels and narrows to a rail; tooltips reveal labels on hover.

behaviors.name: Permissions
behaviors.description: Items the operator can't access are hidden; a pillar with no accessible sub-pages collapses away rather than showing dead ends.

props.name: sections
props.description: Sections by purpose — the Grouped variant; each section has an optional title and its destination items.

props.name: activeId
props.description: The id of the currently active destination; shows the active indicator and exposes aria-current.

props.name: collapsed
props.description: Collapses the drawer to a rail (icons only, labels via tooltip/title) — the Collapsible variant.

props.name: height
props.description: Fixed panel height; the drawer is permanent on desktop, not an overlay.

props.name: className
props.description: Optional extra class names to compose with the base mdc-drawer class.

doThis: Group items by purpose; keep the top level short.
Hide items the user can't access.
dontDoThis: Don't make it a flat dump of every feature.
Don't use brand/codenames as labels — name by job.
Don't put transient page actions in the drawer.
accessibility: Use a navigation landmark with a list of links.
Items are keyboard reachable with visible focus.
Collapsed (icon-only) items keep accessible names via tooltip/label.
